meaning: n.濶ｾ螻樊､咲黄,遽楢雫螻樊､咲黄
examples: Preference Salsola and mugwort sort of grass.
Don't worry I won't be hitting the absinthe or the mugwort to try to induce the visions tonight. I'm knackered.
Ecological surveys found species including Breckland mugwort plants, reptiles, bats, badgers, great crested newts and birds which need protection.
Moxa cones and sticks are made of dried mugwort leaves.
